rationale: Host-tier blocker. 195GB OrbStack identified as primary consumer. Awaiting Joshua green-light on `orbctl prune` (non-destructive). Override unblocks skillos for current capsule cycle. Real fix tracked in flywheel-r65r (Phase A reclaim wave) + flywheel-2rv0 (plan tracking).
